# Beyex

> Beyex Ltd creates immersive 3D virtual tours and digital twins for real spaces — hotels, homes, heritage sites, commercial venues, and industrial facilities — that anyone can walk through in a browser.

Beyex is a UK company (VAT 509 4886 54; CPV 71355100 Photogrammetry services, 71700000 Monitoring and control services). We capture physical spaces with Matterport and photogrammetry and deliver interactive, hostable 3D tours and digital twins.

## Services
- [Virtual Tours — Real Estate & Commercial](https://beyex.com/services/virtual-tours-commercial)
- [Virtual Tours — Hospitality](https://beyex.com/services/virtual-tours-hospitality)
- [Virtual Tours — Tourism & Heritage](https://beyex.com/services/virtual-tours-tourism)
- [Virtual Tours — Education](https://beyex.com/services/virtual-tours-education)
- [Virtual Tours — Real Estate](https://beyex.com/services/virtual-tours-real-estate)
- [Virtual Tours — Construction](https://beyex.com/services/virtual-tours-construction)
- [Digital Twins — Solar & Energy](https://beyex.com/services/digital-twins-solar-energy)
- [Digital Twins — Industries](https://beyex.com/services/digital-twins-industries)
- [Digital Twins — Manufacturing](https://beyex.com/services/digital-twins-manufacturing)
